## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and refine Knapsack's email outreach strategy for financial advisors, addressing recent challenges and planning improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/bshAwWoPszJnRrzwfGzx1zstkofCqNNt?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Financial advisors are conservative and sensitive to overselling; brand protection is crucial](https://fathom.video/share/bshAwWoPszJnRrzwfGzx1zstkofCqNNt?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [Pivot from automation-focused messaging to specific benefits: meeting prep, note-taking, email management, compliance risk reduction](https://fathom.video/share/bshAwWoPszJnRrzwfGzx1zstkofCqNNt?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [New call-to-action: Join waitlist for latest features, leveraging social proof of "5,000 experienced financial advisors on our list"](https://fathom.video/share/bshAwWoPszJnRrzwfGzx1zstkofCqNNt?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
  - [Enhance credibility by mentioning conference attendance (T3, Future Proof) in email signature](https://fathom.video/share/bshAwWoPszJnRrzwfGzx1zstkofCqNNt?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)

## Topics

### Target Audience Characteristics

  - [Financial advisors are conservative in security and social conventions](https://fathom.video/share/bshAwWoPszJnRrzwfGzx1zstkofCqNNt?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Sensitive to overselling and prefer white-glove treatment](https://fathom.video/share/bshAwWoPszJnRrzwfGzx1zstkofCqNNt?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [Insular community where word spreads quickly](https://fathom.video/share/bshAwWoPszJnRrzwfGzx1zstkofCqNNt?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [Prefer high-context, professional communication](https://fathom.video/share/bshAwWoPszJnRrzwfGzx1zstkofCqNNt?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)

### Email Campaign Improvements

  - [Removed 4th email from sequence, now only 3 emails](https://fathom.video/share/bshAwWoPszJnRrzwfGzx1zstkofCqNNt?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
  - [Addressing duplicate outreach issue by cleaning lists](https://fathom.video/share/bshAwWoPszJnRrzwfGzx1zstkofCqNNt?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [Crafting more specific copy based on Guillaume's feedback](https://fathom.video/share/bshAwWoPszJnRrzwfGzx1zstkofCqNNt?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [New focus: meeting prep, note-taking, email overload management, compliance risk reduction](https://fathom.video/share/bshAwWoPszJnRrzwfGzx1zstkofCqNNt?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Call-to-action changed to joining a waitlist for latest features](https://fathom.video/share/bshAwWoPszJnRrzwfGzx1zstkofCqNNt?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)

### Credibility Building

  - [Include mention of conference attendance (T3, Future Proof) in email signature](https://fathom.video/share/bshAwWoPszJnRrzwfGzx1zstkofCqNNt?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
  - [Leverage social proof: "5,000 experienced financial advisors on our list"](https://fathom.video/share/bshAwWoPszJnRrzwfGzx1zstkofCqNNt?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
  - [Avoid making false claims about user numbers or waitlist size](https://fathom.video/share/bshAwWoPszJnRrzwfGzx1zstkofCqNNt?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)

### Technical Setup

  - [Using 50+ email inboxes for outreach (costing \~$300/month)](https://fathom.video/share/bshAwWoPszJnRrzwfGzx1zstkofCqNNt?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)
  - [Inboxes still being warmed up for better deliverability](https://fathom.video/share/bshAwWoPszJnRrzwfGzx1zstkofCqNNt?tab=summary&timestamp=1586.0)
  - [Smart Lead instance and content will remain accessible after engagement ends](https://fathom.video/share/bshAwWoPszJnRrzwfGzx1zstkofCqNNt?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)

### Engagement Timeline

  - [Current engagement ends March 12th](https://fathom.video/share/bshAwWoPszJnRrzwfGzx1zstkofCqNNt?tab=summary&timestamp=1433.0)
  - [Plan needed for smooth handover of assets and accounts](https://fathom.video/share/bshAwWoPszJnRrzwfGzx1zstkofCqNNt?tab=summary&timestamp=1603.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jimmy to craft new email copy with more specific benefits and waitlist call-to-action](https://fathom.video/share/bshAwWoPszJnRrzwfGzx1zstkofCqNNt?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
  - [Mark to review new email templates before implementation](https://fathom.video/share/bshAwWoPszJnRrzwfGzx1zstkofCqNNt?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [Add conference attendance information to email signature](https://fathom.video/share/bshAwWoPszJnRrzwfGzx1zstkofCqNNt?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
  - [Jimmy to send campaign update by end of day or early tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/bshAwWoPszJnRrzwfGzx1zstkofCqNNt?tab=summary&timestamp=1623.0)
  - [Organize handover of email inbox credentials and discuss potential continuation of service](https://fathom.video/share/bshAwWoPszJnRrzwfGzx1zstkofCqNNt?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
  - [Continue tracking response rates to measure effectiveness of new approach](https://fathom.video/share/bshAwWoPszJnRrzwfGzx1zstkofCqNNt?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)
